transcript.title: Opening
transcript.text: Good morning Rushil Bhatia. Here is your daily news for Thursday, July 9. In today's briefing: top headlines, bhopal and madhya pradesh, business and markets, money, tax and personal finance, science and technology, development and policy, across india, around the world. Let's begin.

transcript.title: Top headlines
transcript.text: First, the stories leading the news this morning. 'It will get much worse': Trump as US launches fresh strikes over Iran's Hormuz 'aggression'. United States Central Command forces conducted new strikes against Iran on Thursday. These actions aim to weaken Iran's ability to threaten shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. The strikes followed Iran's recent aggression against commercial vessels and civilian crews. President Donald Trump indicated the possibility of further swift military action against the Islamic Republic. Another paper leak? UGC-NET under lens. The National Testing Agency faces new allegations of a paper leak for the UGC-NET exam. This follows recent issues with the NEET-UG exam and errors in other NET papers. Education ministry seeks details on a circulated PDF allegedly linked to the sociology paper. Opposition leader Rahul Gandhi highlighted these serious allegations on social media. Ind versus Eng: 142 years after men's, Lord's hosts first-ever Women's Test. The England-India Test, beginning on Friday, will be the first women's Test at Lord's. It comes 142 years after the ground hosted its first men's Test. Canada: Lawrence and gang directed Nijjar hit, there's nothing to link Indian govt. Canadian police found no evidence linking India's government to organized crime charges. These charges involve the killing of Hardeep Singh Nijjar in Canada. US indictments against Lawrence Bishnoi and others did not implicate Indian officials. This development supports India's stance on the 2023 allegations. New USCIS rules for H-1B, Green Card applicants start July 10. New United States Citizenship and Immigration Services rules will take effect soon. Applicants must use handwritten or properly reproduced signatures for immigration forms. Improper signatures will lead to rejection without any chance for correction. Applicants should always sign forms by hand before submitting them. ED freezes rupees 440 crore in three TMC accounts in laundering case. The Enforcement Directorate has frozen TMC bank accounts holding rupees 440 crore. These funds are linked to an alleged rupees 160 crore money laundering investigation. The money was reportedly used to purchase an aircraft and a helicopter. These assets were then rented back to the TMC for party use. Manager of a County in Virginia with 35-plus datacenters 'confirms' community datacentre fears. As the tech landscape evolves with AI data centers, electricity costs are soaring. Henrico County, Virginia, has announced a staggering 25 percent hike in electricity bills for government facilities, prompting local officials to urge power conservation among their employees. Residents are also feeling the pinch, with some facing bill doubles. This phenomenon underscores the mounting pressure on community resources amid the rapid expansion of data centers. No fruit in fruit candy, no cocoa in chocolate: FSSAI cracks down on misleading labels. Food regulators have issued notices to several companies for misleading product labels. Kubera Foods faced scrutiny for claiming "100 percent Natural" on buns with preservatives. Ferns N Petals was cited for marketing chocolate with vegetable fat instead of cocoa butter. Lotte India received notices for "100 percent Vegetarian" claims and missing nutritional information. Mahadev app founder Saurabh Chandrakar held in Oman. Mahadev betting app founder Sourabh Chandrakar has been detained in Oman. India is now seeking his extradition or deportation from the country. Chandrakar was previously detained in Dubai but was later released by authorities. The app operated as a large international betting syndicate facilitating illegal online bets. JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon criticise CLARITY Act allowing yield-paying Stablecoins: What he said. JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon strongly opposes the CLARITY Act's stablecoin provisions. He warns that yield-paying stablecoins could create a dangerous shadow banking system. Traditional banks fear these products lack essential capital and liquidity safeguards. Crypto firms, however, see them as expanding consumer choice and innovation. Nijjar case: Lawrence Bishnoi's indictment underscores heavy footprint of Punjab gangs. NEW DELHI: Abandoning the traditional underworld's strict code of secrecy, Lawrence Bishnoi openly rewrote the rules of organised crime, pioneering an audacious digital branding strategy that replaced anonymity with the weaponised spectacle of performative violence. Fans slam Brittany Mahomes over alleged white outfit at Taylor Swift's wedding. Brittany Mahomes faced online backlash after some social media users wrongly believed she wore a white dress to Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding. The criticism stemmed from lighting in her photos and older images from the 2023 Met Gala being mistakenly shared as her wedding look. In reality, Brittany wore a baby blue dress, not white, making the viral controversy a case of misinformation fueled by misleading images.

transcript.title: Bhopal and Madhya Pradesh
transcript.text: Now, news closer to home in Bhopal and across Madhya Pradesh. Ministers Seek Action Against Officer Ordering Drum-Beating In Pratima Bagri's Caste Certificate Case. Both Yadav and Shah told the ministers that they would take feedback on the matter and act accordingly. Monsoon Lays Bare Bhopal's Civic Infrastructure; Potholes Trigger Accidents And Gridlock. Gulmohar Turning: Deep potholes hidden under rainwater. Addiction-Free India: Police Headquarters Prepares Three-Year Roadmap. The DGP said that to achieve the target, active participation should be ensured across all districts from various government departments, educational institutions, social and voluntary organisations, public representatives, religious and community bodies, youth groups and all sections of society. Non-compliance case: Two officials suspended, HC told. Digital Arrest Scams Decline In Indore, But 70 percent Of Cyber Fraud Accused Still At Large. Additional DCP (Crime) Rajesh Dandotiya said account holders are arrested because they knowingly provide their bank accounts to cybercriminals in return for commission. Madhya Pradesh woman, lover kills husband, dumps body under construction bridge. Madhya Pradesh High Court: Notarized Divorce Cannot End Hindu Marriage. Gold, Cash Collected Via Private Receipts At Madhya Pradesh Temple? Probe Is On. Man Kills Younger Brother With Hammer Over Money For Liquor In Indore. The crime came to light on Wednesday morning when the victim's mother and elder brother returned home from the hospital. Ken-Betwa link leaves tribal families fighting for fair compensation. Man dies as vehicle hits him. Reducing pay of Anganwadi workers is unacceptable: MP HC. 13 kg ganja seized, 2 minors, uncle held. 14-months-old girl run over by tractor-trolley. SDM orders probe into alleged land fraud in Dindori. Bhopal tops MP in 'Safe Click 2.0' cyber awareness campaign. Ensure SC ruling on arrests complied with: HC to DGP. Who ordered closure of 2 cr Sandipani school, asks HC. 1 cut every 2 mins: Power at homes out 21k times in June. MP man booked for 'abducting' tribal wife from her relative's house.

transcript.title: Business and markets
transcript.text: Moving to business, the economy and the markets. Levi Strauss shares slip ahead of Q2 earnings report as investors await impact of FIFA World Cup campaign. Analysts expect Levi Strauss to report earnings of 24 cents per share on revenue of $1.52 billion, representing year-over-year growth of 9 percent and 8.6 percent , respectively Laser Power and Infra raises rupees 222 crore from anchor investors ahead of IPO. Laser Power and Infra Limited has raised rupees 222 crore from anchor investors at rupees 214 per share, with a planned IPO of rupees 742 crore opening on July 9, 2026. It reserves allocations for QIBs, NIIs, and retail investors, with listings expected on BSE and NSE by July 16. SBI Funds Management files RHP for IPO; issue opens on July 14. State Bank of India announced that SBI Funds Management has filed the red herring prospectus for its IPO. The offering is an sale of up to 203.71 million shares, with SBI divesting 128.33 million. The IPO opens for subscription on July 14, 2026. Gold, silver prices today: Comex gold slips $107, silver drops $3 as Middle East tensions escalate; Fed minutes in focus. Precious metals saw further losses on 8 July, influenced by renewed Middle East tensions and a strengthening US dollar. Gold dropped to $4,050 and silver fell below $60, as escalating conflicts following US strikes on Iran raised concerns over inflation and interest rates. Wall Street slumps after Trump says Iran deal is 'over', Broadcom climbs 4.2 percent. At 12:04 p.m. ET, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 1.46 percent , the S and P 500 lost 0.89 percent , the Nasdaq Composite lost 0.91 percent Markets tumble after Donald Trump ends ceasefire. The Nifty 50 fell 2.1 percent to 23,882, while the Sensex fell 2.1 percent to 76,503, their lowest levels since 30 March. Bond yields jump, rupee weakens as oil surges after Trump says Iran deal is over. The rise in crude oil prices renewed concerns over inflation and India's external balances. Multibagger small-cap Cupid logs biggest one-day fall in 6 months; ends 3-day rally. Cupid shares fell 11 percent on July 8, reversing a strong 14-session winning streak. After hitting a record high of rupees 226, the stock plunged to rupees 197, marking its biggest single-day decline since January. Retail investors benefited significantly from its 1,416 percent rally over the past years. CBDT exempts NCCL settlement fund from tax. The Central Board of Direct Taxes has granted income-tax exemption to NCCL's Core Settlement Guarantee Fund. Kusumgar IPO: Issue received a solid response on Day 01, booked 3.7 times; GMP signals bumper listing. Kusumgar Limited's IPO saw robust interest on its first day, subscribing 3.67 times with 3.99 crore shares bid against 1.08 lakh available. Non-institutional investors led the demand. The issue closes July 10, with a price band set between rupees 398 and rupees 419. Government steps up efforts to curb 'irrational' drugs. The government plans to act against drugmakers with unlisted products. RBI reiterates push for crypto 'prohibition', cites financial risks and tax evasion. Several key government agencies continue to favour stricter controls on virtual digital assets, even as India has not yet finalised a clear regulatory framework for cryptocurrencies. Dutch starts legal action against Tata Steel unit. Dutch prosecutors have initiated criminal proceedings against Tata Steel IJmuiden. US stock market today: Dow, S and P 500 futures drop up to 1 percent as oil rally and Middle East risks hit sentiment. US stock futures indicated a weak start on 8 July amid rising crude oil prices and tensions in the Middle East. S and P 500 futures fell 0.8 percent , while Dow Jones and Nasdaq futures declined 1 percent . Investor sentiment weakened following US strikes on Iran amid escalating conflict. Trump on Iran: US will probably hit them tonight. US President Donald Trump warned that the United States is likely to launch fresh strikes on Iran on Wednesday night, hours after calling off the ceasfire, saying Washington would "hit them hard." He made the remarks at the NATO summit in Ankara before meeting Volodymyr Zelenskyy. Oil jumps over 6 percent as Trump declares Iran ceasefire, MoU effectively over. The US has reinstated sanctions on Iranian oil and launches fresh strikes, reviving fears of disruption in the Strait of Hormuz and raising fresh concerns for India's energy security and inflation outlook. Trump claims he's Tehran's 'top target'. President Trump stated he is Iran's primary target amid escalating tensions. Top Gainers and Losers on 8 July: Aegis Logistics, HPCL, Bank of India, IndiGo, Coforge, MRF among top losers. The Indian stock market faced heavy selling on Wednesday, with benchmark indices falling over 2 percent amid renewed U.S.-Iran tensions. The Nifty 50 dropped to 23,882, marking its biggest decline since March, and nearly all sectoral indices ended in the red, particularly the Nifty PSU Bank index. Why Trump covets Greenland. Greenland's Arctic location is vital for global security and trade routes. Oberoi Realty's NCR debut spurs growth visibility with solid bookings. Oberoi Realty's debut NCR launch, Three Sixty North, booked rupees 8,109 crore, more than the company's entire FY26 sales. Brokerages have raised price targets and growth estimates, though a heavy MMR-focused pipeline and demand risks remain. Russia bans diesel exports to ensure domestic supply. Russia has banned diesel exports to support its domestic fuel market. BPCL, HPCL to IOC: OMC stocks fall up to 5.5 percent on sharp rebound in crude oil prices. State-owned oil marketing companies HPCL, BPCL, and IOC saw their shares drop as crude oil prices surged due to Middle East tensions. Investors booked profits after price declines, with HPCL down 5.4 percent , BPCL 4.7 percent , and IOC 3.5 percent . Existing conditions may pressure OMCs' profit margins. Deeply concerned: India on rising Iran tensions. India voiced deep concern over recent attacks on commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. Oil prices jump to more than $78 a barrel as Trump says ceasefire with Iran is 'over'. Oil prices rose nearly 6 percent after US President Trump declared the interim agreement with Iran is over. Details here. India tests Pinaka Long-Range Guided Rocket. India successfully conducted a flight test of its Pinaka Long Range Guided Rocket. Defence sector Q1 results preview: Muted earnings likely on execution delays; BEL, Bharat Dynamics, GRSE among top picks. Defence sector Q1 results preview: While reported earnings of defence sector may remain subdued, underlying execution momentum is gradually building, with clearer visibility on recovery expected as conversion accelerates through the year, particularly into H2FY27, analysts said. Truce over? Why Trump ended Iran ceasefire. US President Trump declared the Iran truce effectively over after attacks on shipping. Paint makers poised for a mixed Q1; won't rush on price cuts. Price hikes augur well for the June-quarter revenue growth. Indian Navy UAV crashes near Porbandar city. An Indian Navy unmanned aerial vehicle crashed into an open field near Porbandar. Multibagger stock Diamond Power hits record high despite stock market crash. InCred sees 28 percent more upside. Diamond Power's financial position has notably improved, with working capital now funded by promoters. The stock surged 6.5 percent to rupees 240 despite market declines, supported by an optimistic earnings outlook from InCred, which rates it an 'ADD' with a target price of rupees 300.

transcript.title: Money, tax and personal finance
transcript.text: Now to your money — taxes, savings and personal finance. EPF interest credit by July 15, 2026: How to check if 8.25 percent interest has been credited to your PF account. Employees' Provident Fund interest for FY 2025-26 will be credited by July 15, 2026. Subscribers will receive an 8.25 percent interest rate on their EPF contributions. This marks the third consecutive year the interest rate remains unchanged. EPFO members can check their balance through the UMANG app or SMS service. UPI and personal loans are replacing credit cards in Indians' wallets: CIBIL. Credit card penetration in India remains low, with only 5.2 crore holders, representing 25 percent of the credit-active population. While usage is rising, first-time borrowers account for just 8 percent of new credit card issuances Binance's Richard Teng on crypto's role in modern financial infrastructure. Digital asset infrastructure is increasingly driven by efficiency and market access. Blockchain networks offer faster settlement and continuous risk management capabilities. Tokenisation and multi-asset platforms are reshaping financial distribution models. Clear regulation will significantly shape mainstream adoption of these technologies. PPF account turns dormant if you invest less than rupees 500 a year: What you lose and how to revive it. PPF accounts become inactive if the annual rupees 500 minimum deposit is missed, restricting benefits. Activation requires a request and payment of a penalty. Full details here. ITR filing 2026: Step-by-step guide to filing ITR-2 online on the income tax portal. Individuals and HUFs not eligible for ITR-1 can file ITR-2 online. This guide details the necessary documents and steps for submission. The e-filing portal requires filling specific schedules before final submission. Pre-filled data in Part A General needs verification and potential profile updates. Sebi reintroduces open-market share buybacks: How your gains will be taxed and what to consider before participating. Sebi has notified rules for open-market share buybacks effective 1 August 2026, allowing companies to repurchase shares through stock exchanges. Here's how your capital gains will be taxed and what to consider before selling your shares via the open market. Filing ITR for FY 2025-26? Income Tax Department shares 10 mistakes to avoid and tips to follow. Taxpayers should gather documents and choose the correct tax regime and ITR form. Verify Annual Information Statement and Form 26AS details carefully before filing. Ensure all personal information and pre-filled data are accurate and verified. How many mutual funds should you own? Experts explain the right portfolio mix. Managing too many mutual funds complicates portfolio tracking without enhancing diversification. Experts suggest three to six funds can suffice, emphasising a mix of large, mid, and small-cap funds along with debt for balance. Senior citizen wins full refund and rupees 20 lakh compensation from Air India for defective business class seat that caused pain, vertigo. Senior citizen paid rupees 1.23 lakh extra to upgrade to Air India business class due to his cervical spondylosis condition but seats turned to be faulty causing him neck, shoulder, lumbar pain and vertigo; NCDRC upheld rupees 20lakh compensation, refund order Read below to know how the senior citizen won the case. As the Magnificent 7 lose swagger, which stock should you buy now? Experts reveal the right strategy. The Magnificent Seven tech giants are losing investor interest as their performance lags behind the Nasdaq 100 and S and P 500. Emerging chipmakers like Micron Technology are gaining traction, while stocks like Alphabet show potential amidst differing fortunes among the group. Income tax slabs for Tax Year 2026-2027, FY 2025-26 (AY 2026-27) under the new tax regime. The new Income Tax Act, 2025, takes effect from April 1, 2026, maintaining current tax slab rates. Highest tax rate remains 30 percent for incomes exceeding rupees 24 lakh under this regime. Marginal relief prevents excessive tax burdens when income slightly crosses rupees 12 lakh. The new tax regime is now the default option for individual taxpayers. Quant Mid Cap Fund beats benchmark in short term after years of lag: Expert explains what investors should do. Quant Mid Cap Fund has outperformed its benchmark index over the last 3 and 6 months, but continues to lag over the 1-, 3-, and 5-year periods. The expert attributed the rebound to portfolio repositioning and advised investors to focus on long-term consistency. I have become a foreign citizen. Can my mother make me a joint owner in her property in India?. ET Wealth Reader's Query: I am a foreign citizen and an only son. My mother wants to make me the joint owner in a property that belongs to her. Is this permitted in India considering that I now have a foreign citizenship? ITR filing 2026: Preventive health checkups can help you save tax , here's how. The ITR filing deadline is approaching, prompting taxpayers to prepare documents and explore deductions. Section 80D allows deductions for preventive health checkups, capped at rupees 5,000, applicable only in the old tax regime. 22k gold rate today: Check 24k, 22k, 20k, 18k gold prices (July 8, 2026) at Malabar Gold and Diamonds, Tanishq, Joyalukkas, Kalyan Jewellers and IBJA. Gold prices saw a slight decrease today across major Indian jewellery retailers. Tanishq, Malabar Gold and Diamonds, Kalyan Jewellers, and Joyalukkas reduced their 22-carat gold rates. These price adjustments were observed in key cities nationwide. EPFO portal revamp: 10 changes in PF claims, withdrawals and transfers every member should know. The Employees' Provident Fund Organisation has centralised its member database through the CITES project to enhance service speed, transparency, and accessibility. Opting for presumptive taxation while filing ITR? You may have to face tax audit; here's what you must know. The Income-tax Act, 2025 introduces a new audit trigger for businesses. This change clarifies audit requirements for low-profit businesses under presumptive taxation. Previously, ambiguity existed regarding mandatory audits for lower profit declarations. The new Act expressly links lower-than-presumptive profit declarations to mandatory audits. Can tenants continue paying old rent if they overstay after lease expires? Delhi HC answers. The Delhi HC ruled that tenants staying in a property after lease expiration may face higher rent due to automatic escalation clauses. Here's all you need to know. rupees 20,000 SIP versus rupees 20,000 RD: Which monthly investment can generate higher returns in 5 years?. Monthly investments of rupees 20,000 in mutual fund SIPs and bank RDs are compared. SIPs offer potential for higher returns over five years, while RDs provide predictable outcomes. India Post RD offers 6.7 percent interest, yielding rupees 14.27 lakh after five years. How much should you invest in mutual funds? Experts say there's no magic number. A 20-30 percent investment target can be a useful starting point, but the right SIP depends on your goals, emergency savings and ability to increase investments as income grows. FCNR(B) FD versus NRE FD: Where can NRIs earn more on $50,000 investment? Compare returns, currency risk and tax benefits. Non-resident Indians (NRIs) and overseas citizens of India (OCIs) can consider investing in FCNR(B) and NRE fixed deposits to achieve reliable returns. While FCNR(B) deposits safeguard against currency fluctuations as they are held in foreign currency, NRE deposits offer opportunities in Indian rupees without such protection. Ultimately, your decision should align with your currency expectations and future financial objectives. Both investment avenues are tax-exempt and allow full repatriation. EPFO starts crediting interest for FY26: When will it reflect? How to check in EPFO portal and other platforms. EPFO will credit FY26 interest at 8.25 percent to 34 crore member accounts by July 15. Members can check the updated amounts online through various methods, including the EPFO Portal, UMANG app, missed calls, SMS, and DigiLocker after activating their UAN. Gifted a house to your spouse? You may still have to pay tax on the rental income: Know 7 key things before filing ITR for AY 2026-27. Many taxpayers mistakenly believe that rental income from a house gifted to a spouse is taxable in the recipient spouse's hands. This article explains the clubbing and deemed ownership provisions under Sections 27 and 64, the correct ITR reporting requirements, and seven key things taxpayers should know before filing ITR for AY 2026-27. Earning rupees 30 lakh? The wrong tax regime could cost you over rupees 1 lakh. A rupees 30 lakh salary puts taxpayers in a bracket where tax planning matters more than ever. Here's how much tax you pay under the old and new regimes and which one works better. NPS latest update: Central Autonomous Body employees can now choose 2 additional NPS investment options. Central government employees now have two new investment choices. These options were previously available only to central government employees. Now, National Pension System subscribers in Central Autonomous Bodies can also access them. Clubbing income: Tax return mistakes that many discover only after receiving a notice. As taxpayers finalize their returns this filing season, it may be worthwhile to spend a few extra minutes reviewing investments in the name of your spouse and minor children Filing ITR for easy loans, visas, and scholarships - sounds strange? Know why filing ITR is more important than you think. Consistently filing Income Tax Returns creates a verifiable financial document. Banks often request these returns to assess loan applicant income stability. IT rupees also help demonstrate financial capacity for visa and study abroad applications. Landlords and businesses may seek IT rupees for tenancy and partnership evaluations.

transcript.title: Science and technology
transcript.text: Next, science and technology. Moto G77 Power launched in India: Check price, specifications and sale date. Motorola has launched the Moto G77 Power in India, featuring a 7,000mAh battery, 50MP camera, and MediaTek Dimensity 6400 processor. Pixel 11 launch date revealed: Made by Google event announced for August 12. Google's next Made by Google launch event is set for August 12, 2026, in New York City. ChatGPT image generation down- OpenAI says 'implementing mitigation'. ChatGPT faced a widespread outage on Tuesday, with users reporting issues generating images and accessing past chats. OpenAI confirms it's investigating. Apple now asks users before sending Apple Intelligence requests to Google Cloud. Apple's integration of Google's AI has improved features but requires sharing user data with Google Cloud. Apple finally brings back card payments for subscriptions and App Store purchases in India. Apple has resumesdcard payments for App Store purchases in India after a four-year hiatus. Initially, only Visa and Mastercard will be accepted. Apple could bring back its iPhone X playbook for the iPhone Ultra. Apple could be planning to use the iPhone X playbook with the iPhone Ultra by delaying the initial pre-sales and orders for the foldable iPhone. New AI agent can hack systems and deploy ransomware without human help. A new report reveals that AI agents can autonomously execute ransomware attacks, evidenced by the case of JADEPUFFER, which exploited a critical vulnerability to infiltrate systems. iOS 27 beta 2 leak reveals new clue about Apple's camera-equipped AirPods: Here's what we know. Apple could be teasing a new AirPods Pro with cameras with the latest beta version of iOS 27 beta. WhatsApp usernames: Will they make India's digital conversations safer or less trustworthy? Experts weigh in. As digital platforms evolve in India, the way people identify themselves online is clearly changing too. WhatsApp's move towards usernames is more than a feature update. WhatsApp username row: Zoho's Arattai to disable username feature. Zoho's Arattai will remove its username-based account feature after the regulatory challenges faced by WhatsApp. Meta spent billions on AI, but Zuckerberg says progress has been slower than expected: Report. Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg acknowledged the shortcomings of the company's recent restructuring and the slow development of AI agents. WhatsApp issues username FAQs amid govt scrutiny, Can someone find you with it? Could you be impersonated? Check details. Meta Platforms' messaging app WhatsApp has released detailed set of frequently asked questions (FAQs) for users on its new username feature following controversy over safety and security of the rollout. Oppo Reno 16, Reno 16c launched in India: Check price, specs and more. Oppo launched the Reno 16 series featuring Snapdragon processors and AMOLED displays. Prices in India start at rupees 46,999 for the Reno 16c and rupees 61,999 for the Reno 16 Meta plans to rent AI computing power as it takes on AWS, Google Cloud: Report. Meta is developing a cloud infrastructure to sell AI computing access, competing with AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. WhatsApp usernames could open the platform to impersonations and scams, warn cybersecurity experts: Here is how. Meta's WhatsApp is launching usernames for privacy, enabling users to interact without disclosing phone numbers. While this can protect user identity, experts warn of risks like impersonation and scams, highlighting the necessity for robust anti-abuse measures to ensure safety amid these changes. Key details about iPhone 18 Pro leak online after hackers gain access to 630 GB data from Tata Electronics. Leaks from Tata Electronics reveal details about Apple's upcoming iPhone 18 Pro, including component suppliers and internal documents after a ransomware attack. This breach, involving over 200,000 files, threatens Apple's supplier relationships and business strategy ahead of the September launch. Samsung Galaxy A27 5G debuts in India with 120Hz AMOLED display, price starts at rupees 28,999. Samsung Galaxy A27 5G features a 6.7-inch Full HD+ Super AMOLED display, Snapdragon 6 Gen 3 chipset, 50MP triple rear camera, and 5,000mAh battery. OnePlus N6 5G launched in India with 8,000mAh battery, Dimensity 6360 Apex processor: Check price and specs. The OnePlus N6 features a 6.75-inch HD display, MediaTek Dimensity 6360 Apex processor, 8,000mAh battery, and military-grade durability. WhatsApp to let users reserve usernames from next week: Here's how it works. WhatsApp introduces a username system to eliminate the need to share your phone number. The company will allow users to select their usernames starting next week. WhatsApp to let users chat without sharing phone numbers: Username feature coming soon. WhatsApp, which says it has more than 3 billion users globally, has until now allowed users to be contacted by anyone who has their phone number. Will iPhone 17 Pro Max cost nearly rupees 2 lakh in India? Leak suggests so. The iPhone 17 Pro, currently priced at rupees 1,34,900, could reportedly retail between rupees 1,54,900 and rupees 1,69,900. The iPhone 17 Pro Max may be priced between rupees 1,84,900 and rupees 1,99,900, compared with its current price of rupees 1,49,900. Samsung Galaxy M47 5G launched in India with 6,000mAh battery, 50MP OIS camera. Samsung has launched the Galaxy M47 5G in India with a price of rupees 22,999. The phone features a Snapdragon 6 Gen 3 chipset, 6.7-inch AMOLED display, 6,000mAh battery, and a 50MP camera. Apple prepares smart glasses to take on Meta, launch tipped for next year. Apple is eyeing the smart glasses market, potentially releasing its first model next year. Apple could be looking to leverage its strong ecosystem to bring in buyers, a report claims iPhone 18 Pro launch date, expected price, processor and camera upgrades. Leaks suggest Apple's iPhone 18 Pro lineup may launch on September 8 or 9. The phone is expected to see a price of around $1,200-$1,300 iPhone 18 Pro, iPhone 18 Pro Max could see up to $200 price hike, says report. Apple could raise the prices for the upcoming iPhone 18 Pro models by up to $200. The iPhone 18 Pro could be priced at $1,200-$1,300, if the new report is to be believed Mint Explainer: Why quantum computing is the next geopolitical race. With multi-billion dollar investments and new US executive orders targeting a 2028 breakthrough, global powers are rushing to secure hardware superiority before 'Q-Day' upends modern encryption.

transcript.title: Development and policy
transcript.text: Now to development, infrastructure and government policy. The Great Nicobar Project: India's Indian Ocean Power Play. IMF Projects India to Remain World's Fastest-Growing Major Economy. Proposed solar project in India's largest grassland sparks conservation concerns. India's Modi Seeks to Project Influence on Asia-Pacific Trip. India and Japan to Co-develop Naval Radio Antenna Based on UNICORN. Backlash on ethanol-blend fuel intensifies in India, puts carmakers in the dock. India's fintech frontier is moving from transaction infrastructure to decision infrastructure. #CNBCTV18 Analysis Why Q1 Growth Could Beat 7 percent Despite RBI's 6.6 percent Forecast Credit growth accelerated PMI remained resilient Support from higher exports Consumption stayed strong Latha Venkatesh makes the bull case #Economy #India #GDP. Australia's largest pension fund invests A$500 million in India's infrastructure fund. Modi, Prabowo inaugurate temple restoration project. Why is India Allowing Chinese Equipment in Critical Government Projects Again?.

transcript.title: Across India
transcript.text: Turning to the big national stories. Ensure flyers' convenience are improved across airports: HM. NEW DELHI: Home minister Amit Shah Wednesday directed that all 62 major airports in the country, including 21 under development and 41 prioritised for development, based on passenger traffic, be brought in line within two years, with standards prescribed by the Bureau of Civil Aviation Security (BCAS), with the objective of enhancing passenger convenience while ensuring that the commercial areas remain within prescribed norms. US indictments underscore the heavy footprint of Punjab gangs. NEW DELHI: Abandoning the traditional underworld's strict code of secrecy, Lawrence Bishnoi openly rewrote the rules of organised crime, pioneering an audacious digital branding strategy that replaced anonymity with the weaponised spectacle of performative violence. Clean-fuel commercial vehicles' permit waiver capped at 7 years. NEW DELHI: All commercial vehicles on electric and powered by E85 (85 percent ethanol), M100 (100 percent methanol) or hydrogen will be exempt from obtaining permits only for seven years, road transport ministry said in a notification, reports Dipak Dash. Ex-Navy chief, Niti VC were part of Padma jury. NEW DELHI: Former Chief of Naval Staff R Hari Kumar, Niti Aayog vice-chairman Ashok Lahiri, ex-hockey player P R Sreejesh, lyricist Prasoon Joshi, cardiac surgeon Devi Shetty, actor Chandra Prakash Dwivedi who played the lead role in 'Chanakya' TV series and politicians Vinay Sahastrabuddhe and Bhartruhari Mahtab were part of the 30-member Padma Awards selection committee for the year 2026, reports Bharti Jain. ED seizes rupees 113 crore assets of industrialist Punj and his Lloyd Electric. NEW DELHI: ED Wednesday said it had attached property worth rupees 113 crore of industrialist Bharat Raj Punj and his Lloyd Electric and Engineering Ltd in a case of alleged laundering of over rupees 376 crore of bank funds. Omar backs suspension of Indus Water Treaty, says Centre will respond to Pak war-mongering. Jammu and Kashmir Chief Minister Omar Abdullah supports India's suspension of the Indus Water Treaty. He stated the treaty was never in the region's best interest and opposed it from its inception. Abdullah blamed the treaty for the power crisis experienced within Jammu and Kashmir. India suspended the water sharing pact after a significant terror attack last year. GER hits 30 percent , but pace lags 2035 target. India's higher education enrollment grew slowly in 2023-24. The Gross Enrolment Ratio reached thirty percent nationally. This pace challenges the fifty percent target by twenty thirty-five. Enrollment access remains uneven for Scheduled Castes and Tribes. Isro successfully conducts key test on main parachutes for Gaganyaan crew module. NEW DELHI: In another big step towards India's first human spaceflight mission, Isro has successfully conducted a key test on the main parachutes for the crew module of the Gaganyaan programme. CSIR-NAL completes design of indigenous 19-seater Saras MkII light transport aircraft; minister calls it a 'milestone' in aviation sector. NEW DELHI: In a significant step towards building the country's first indigenously designed light transport aircraft, CSIR-National Aerospace Laboratories (CSIR-NAL), India's premier research and development agency for aviation, has completed the design phase of the 19-seater Saras MkII aircraft. Government floats RFP for coal gasification projects. NEW DELHI: Giving a push to its ambitious coal and lignite gasification programme, govt Wednesday floated a request for proposal (RFP) inviting companies to set up projects under its rupees 37,500-crore incentive scheme. 'No territory use against India': Myanmar assures Delhi at border security talks. NEW DELHI: India and Myanmar held a national level meeting held here on Wednesday and Thursday, reviewing the prevailing security situation along their border, with Myanmar assuring Delhi that it shall not permit its territory to be used against India's security interests. Amit Shah sets 2-year deadline to upgrade 62 major airports, boost security. NEW DELHI: Home minister Amit Shah on Wednesday directed that all 62 major airports in the country -- including 21 under development and 41 prioritised for development, based on passenger traffic -- be brought in line within two years, with standards prescribed by the Bureau of Civil Aviation Security (BCAS), with the objective of enhancing passenger convenience while ensuring that the commercial areas remain within prescribed norms. Operation 'hardball': Indian agencies shared, verified list of names and hideouts with US. In their recent meetings, the central agencies are learnt to have shared and verified with US officials a list of associates of Lawrence Bishnoi and Goldy Brar, along with details of their possible hideouts. PM Christopher Luxon interview: 'New Zealand, working with India, needs to remake case for a rules-based system'. Luxon has been the New Zealand PM since 2023 and visited India in March last year.

transcript.title: Around the world
transcript.text: And finally, here is what is happening around the world. Ukraine to get licence to produce Patriot missiles, Trump says. Although the Patriots are highly effective against Russia's ballistic missiles, they also have lengthy production times. German doctor jailed for murder of 15 patients and suspected of more. The German palliative care doctor has been sentenced to life imprisonment for killing 15 of his patients. Nato allies announce £37bn for new missile project. Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer will convene around a dozen leaders to discuss the programme in Ankara.

transcript.title: Sign-off
transcript.text: That is your briefing. Stay sharp, and have a strong day.
